The '''''Stormclaw''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Stormclaw'' is called an "Imperial Star Destroyer" in ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'', implying that she was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class]] ship.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-02-XX -->''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''
